General.Name: Ramsay Generale De Sante
General.Description: Ramsay Générale de Santé SA operates healthcare facilities in France, Sweden, Norway, Denmark, and Italy. The company operates medical centres, and mental health day care centres in France; and provides primary medicine, medicine surgery obstetrics (MSO) dialysis, oncology, medical imaging, medical care, follow-up and rehabilitation care, geriatrics, home care and hospitalization, mental health care, and addiction treatment, telemedicine e health, elderly, emergency, maternity, nutrition, obesity and eating disorders, outpatient surgery and eras, relaxation therapy, cardiac and neuro surgery, clinical and biological activities in medically assisted reproduction, cancer treatment for external radiotherapy and brachytherapy, and SMR services. The company was formerly known as Générale de Santé SA and changed its name to Ramsay Générale de Santé SA in December 2015. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Paris, France. Ramsay Générale de Santé SA operates as a subsidiary of Ramsay Health Care Limited.
